name: book-of-engineering
description: Engineering workflow skills for current-work context, next-action prioritization, work-item preflight audits, readiness-aware issue updates, locale-grounded translation, and review response workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Engineering context, preflight, translation, and review response skills.
interface.longDescription: Book of Engineering packages practical engineering workflow skills for inspecting current work context, deciding what to do next, auditing work-item validity before implementation, drafting readiness-aware tracker updates, translating user-facing text with the Grimoire session locale, and translating, deciding, implementing, and answering code review feedback.
defaultPrompt: Use $now-what to inspect this workspace and recommend what to do next.
Use $now-what to prioritize the current repo and branch context.
Use $now-what to decide the next current-work action.
Use $issue-preflight to audit whether this work item is still valid before implementing.
Use $issue-readiness-review to review this work item for implementation readiness and draft the appropriate tracker update.
Use $magical-translation to translate this into my configured Grimoire locale.
Use $magical-review-response to translate and handle this PR review feedback end to end.
